steps: Add 1 L Milli-Q H 2 O to a clean media bottle
Add 50 mg Ca(NO 3 ) 2 *4H 2 O calcium nitrate Contributed by users
Add 100 mg KNO 3 Potassium nitrate Contributed by users
Add 50 mg NaNO 3 Sodium nitrate P212121
Add 40 mg Na 2 SO 4 Sodium sulfate P212121
Add 50 mg MgCl 2 *6H 2 O Magnesium Chloride Fisher Scientific Catalog #AC223210010
Add 5 mg Na 2 EDTA*2H 2 O EDTA disodium dihydrate Abblis Catalog #AB1011793
Add 0.5 mg FeCl 3 *6H 2 O Iron(III) chloride hexahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #44944
Add 5 mg MnCl 2 *4H 2 O Manganese chloride Fisher Scientific Catalog #7773-01-5
Add 0.5 mg ZnCl 2 Zinc dichloride Contributed by users
Add 5 mg CoCl 2 *6H 2 O Cobalt (II) chloride hexahydrate Fisher Scientific Catalog #7791-13-1
Add 0.8 mg Na 2 MoO 4 *2H 2 O Sodium molybdate dihydrate Contributed by users
Add 20 mg H 3 BO 3 Boric acid Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP1681
Add 500 mg Bicine Bicine Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP26461
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
